mapper.update: UPDATE forum_comment SET haveChild = ( haveChild + 1 ) WHERE commentId = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT commentId, forumId, fatherId, haveChild, userId, toUserId, likeNum, comment, comImgUrl, createdTime FROM forum_comment WHERE fatherId is NULL and forumId = #{forumId} ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT commentId, forumId, fatherId, haveChild, userId, toUserId, likeNum, comment, comImgUrl, createdTime FROM forum_comment WHERE forumId = #{forumId} and fatherId = #{fatherCommentId} ORDER BY createdTime DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_comment (forumId, fatherId, haveChild, userId, toUserId, likeNum, comment, comImgUrl, createdTime) VALUES (#{forumId}, #{fatherId}, #{haveChild}, #{userId}, #{toUserId}, #{likeNum}, #{comment}, #{comImgUrl}, #{createdTime})
